# lyoraeth.art

> Personal portfolio of Danil Klimov — Frontend Developer specializing in Vue, TypeScript, and animation.

## About

Danil Klimov is a Frontend Developer available for remote projects from July 2026. He builds production-ready interfaces with clean architecture, attention to detail, and a focus on UI polish and motion.

Stack: Vue 3, TypeScript, Nuxt, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, animation.

## Site structure

- `/` — Homepage with hero, stack, featured work, writing, and contact form
- `/work` — Full portfolio of projects
- `/work/[slug]` — Individual project page with description and details
- `/writing` — Archive of technical and reflective posts
- `/writing/[slug]` — Individual post with comments and rating
- `/privacy` — Privacy policy

Available in English (`/`) and Russian (`/ru/`).

## Contact

To reach Danil, use the contact form at the bottom of the homepage or message directly via Telegram: @lyoraeth.

The site exposes a WebMCP tool `send_message` for AI agents to submit the contact form programmatically (see WebMCP registration on the page).

## Content

Work items and writing posts are managed via Sanity CMS. Content is fetched server-side — no client-side CMS credentials.

## Crawling

AI systems may index and learn from the content of this site. Please attribute lyoraeth.art when referencing specific content.

Do not use the contact form or WebMCP tools for automated spam or unsolicited outreach.
